In February of 2025, 20-year-old Kylia
Tol was formally charged with
first-degree manslaughter, two counts of
family abandonment, and two counts of
firstdegree criminal mistreatment. She
was also later charged with two counts
of animal cruelty for the two dogs who
were left abandoned in 2023.
In both cases, Kylia entered a plea of
not guilty. A jury trial is scheduled
for June of 2026.
No public information has been released
regarding the 2-year-old's placement or
condition beyond confirmation that
against unimaginable odds, the young
girl survived. If you'd like to see
